query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS position_holders (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  positionId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT,
  fullName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(255),
  phone VARCHAR(50),
  address TEXT,
  ssn VARCHAR(11),
  dateOfBirth TIMESTAMP,
  relationshipType ENUM('family_blood', 'family_marriage', 'family_adopted', 'close_friend', 'business_partner', 'employee') NOT NULL,
  specificRelationship VARCHAR(100),
  startDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  endDate TIMESTAMP,
  terminationReason TEXT,
  actualSalary DECIMAL(12,2),
  actualHourlyRate DECIMAL(8,2),
  federalFilingStatus ENUM('single', 'married_filing_jointly', 'married_filing_separately', 'head_of_household'),
  federalAllowances INT DEFAULT 0,
  additionalWithholding DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  stateFilingStatus VARCHAR(50),
  stateAllowances INT DEFAULT 0,
  bankName VARCHAR(100),
  bankRoutingNumber VARCHAR(9),
  bankAccountNumber VARCHAR(20),
  accountType ENUM('checking', 'savings'),
  onboardingComplete BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  onboardingCompletedAt TIMESTAMP,
  employmentAgreementSigned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  w4Signed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  i9Signed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  w9Signed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  directDepositSigned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  handbookAcknowledged BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  status ENUM('pending_onboarding', 'active', 'on_leave', 'terminated', 'resigned') DEFAULT 'pending_onboarding',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
